## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss blog content strategy, performance, and SEO improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [19 articles published this week (1 short of 20 goal); 21 planned for next week to clear backlog](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [20 MQLs generated from blog content in May (13 days of data)](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Focus shifting to higher-tier competitors (Sindigo, Salesify, Bazaar Voice)](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Need to improve backlinks, especially for product pages and key content](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Shopify-related content generating most leads, but conflicts with desired positioning](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Backlog

  - [19 articles published this week (1 short of 20 goal)](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [21 articles planned for next week to clear backlog](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Total of 430 articles produced so far](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

### Blog Performance Metrics

  - [May data (13 days): 20 MQLs generated](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Cumulative impressions tracked (specific number not provided)](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Need to add publication dates, impressions, and clicks to blog performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

### SEO Strategy and Competitor Analysis

  - [Shifting focus to higher-tier competitors: Sindigo, Salesify, Bazaar Voice](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Current website authority score: 40 (overall), 0 (specific product/blog pages)](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Need to improve backlinks, especially for product and key content pages](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Plan to conduct competitive analysis on organic visitors, content strategy, top-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

### Content Optimization and Interlinking

  - [Discuss dynamic content promotion within blogs (e.g., event banners, product launches)](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Improve interlinking between blog posts, product pages, and event pages](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Add more prominent content suggestions within blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Lead Generation Analysis

  - [Shopify and livestream-related content generating most leads (conflicts with desired positioning)](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Need to analyze why some topics (e.g., content curation, syndication) aren't generating leads](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Investigate keyword strategies and URL naming conventions for better performance](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)

### Technical SEO and Analytics

  - [Plan to conduct Search Console training for Cameron to improve analytics capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Investigate search queries leading to blog traffic (compare with SEM data)](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Add publication dates, impressions, and clicks to blog performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Conduct competitive analysis on Sindigo, Salesify, and Bazaar Voice](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Develop strategy for high-quality backlinks (DA 30-70) for product and key content pages](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Analyze naming conventions and keyword strategies for blog URLs](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Investigate performance of content related to curation, syndication, and conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Schedule Search Console training session for Cameron](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Begin aggressive backlink building strategy (aim for 20 backlinks per month)](https://fathom.video/share/eyNxsfFErfCVLsqpG1DQ5S_yyYeMPHfp?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
